name: team series success rate from plays
description: Test case for team series success rate from plays
expected_query: with "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN series_result IN ('FIRST_DOWN', 'TOUCHDOWN') THEN CONCAT(esbid, '_', series_seq) END) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN series_result NOT IN ('QB_KNEEL', 'END_OF_HALF') THEN CONCAT(esbid, '_', series_seq) END) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_REG_WEEK_19', '2024_REG_WEEK_20', '2024_REG_WEEK_21', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_numerator) / sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays" AS "team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
